subject: Missing customerId field
description: This object omits the required customerId field and must be rejected by the parser.

subject: Invalid category string
description: The category value does not match any TicketCategory enum member and must produce a parse error.

subject: Invalid priority string
description: The priority value is not a member of the TicketPriority enum and must be rejected.
The subject field is an empty string which the parser must treat as missing and reject.

subject: Empty customerId string
description: The customerId field is present but is an empty string which is treated as missing.

this is not an object and must trigger a parse error for this array element

subject: Invalid source enum value
description: The source value does not match any TicketSource enum member and must be rejected by the parser.
